description: Send notifications to your own Matrix destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise matrix:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead compose the Matrix client API URL from your stored secrets and POST a native m.room.message payload directly, bypassing Apprise.
name: msg-to-matrix

request.template: {"urls":"matrix://${ customer_secrets.MATRIX_USER }:${ customer_secrets.MATRIX_PASSWORD }@${ customer_secrets.MATRIX_HOST }/#${ customer_secrets.MATRIX_TARGETS }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"matrix://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.user_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.password_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }/#${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
{"msgtype":"m.text","body":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}

gateway-plus.base_url: ${ customer_secrets.MATRIX_BASE ?? https://matrix.org }/_matrix/client/v3/rooms/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.room_secret }} }/send/m.room.message/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.txn_secret }} }

request.template: {"msgtype":"m.text","body":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
